skill1.kitLine: Activates only when Explore Route Stage 1 is at max stacks. Affects self. Distributed Damage ▲ 49.58% continuously.
skill1.note: Stage-1-max gate encoded as a blind passive proxy (2s stack window outlasts 1.35s reload → effectively permanent). Only boosts her distributed hits = the burst nuke. Gate timing approximate (⚑3 proxy).

skill1.kitLine: Activates only when Explore Route Stage 2 is at max stacks. Affects self. Damage dealt when attacking core ▲ 25.25% continuously.
skill1.note: Gate encoded as firing-tracking proxy: hitCount 20 = 10 pulls = the 10-stack rebuild, dur 1s. Lapses ~1s into reload, ~0.42s rebuild. hit-counter carries over reloads so rebuild is slightly optimistic (⚑3).

skill1.kitLine: Activates only when Explore Route Stage 3 is at max stacks. Affects self. Critical Rate ▲ 16.73% continuously.
skill1.note: Gate encoded as firing-tracking proxy: hitCount 10 = 5 pulls, dur 0.5s. Same construction as S1b (⚑3 proxy, slightly optimistic rebuild).

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 2 normal attacks. Affects self.
skill2.where: skill2[0] trigger hitCount count 2, target self
skill2.note: ⚑2 hits-vs-pulls ambiguity: count 2 = every pull at hitsPerShot 2; if '2 normal attacks' means 2 SHOTS it would be count 4. Steady-state insensitive, ramp-only.

skill2.kitLine: Effects vary for each stage. Each subsequent effect triggers all effects before it (cascade).
skill2.where: skill2[0] — all six stacks on the ONE hitCount-2 block
skill2.note: Cascade encoded by co-locating all stages on one block (at stage 3 every activation applies all). Stage-unlock ORDERING is NOT encoded — see next two gate lines / ⚑4.

skill2.kitLine: Stage 1: Hit Rate ▲ 1.36%. Stacks up to 10 times and lasts for 2 sec.
skill2.note: hitRatePct is INERT in v1 (HARD RULE 4, kept) — core-rate lift unmeasured (⚑5).

skill2.kitLine: Stage 1: ATK ▲ 2.45%. Stacks up to 10 times and lasts for 2 sec.
skill2.note: Stage-1 (2s) survives the 1.35s reload → near-permanent while firing.

skill2.kitLine: Stage 2: Activates when Explore Route Stage 1 is at max stacks. Affects self.
skill2.where: not encoded as a gate (documented in note + caveat ⚑4, NOT in unmodeled array)
skill2.note: Stage-unlock ordering gate is represented nowhere in block/config/unmodeled — but it is DOCUMENTED (not a silent drop): stage-2/3 build in parallel with stage-1, slight over-credit during ramp/post-reload (~0.4–0.8s). This is the named HOT baseline driver (⚑2/⚑4).

skill2.kitLine: Stage 2: Hit Rate ▲ 2.71%. Stacks up to 10 times and lasts for 1 sec.
skill2.note: hitRatePct inert v1 (⚑5). 1s duration lapses each reload and rebuilds on resume.

skill2.kitLine: Stage 2: ATK ▲ 4.9%, stacks up to 10 times and lasts for 1 sec.
skill2.note: 1s lapses each reload, rebuilds on resume (distinct value = distinct co-stacking key).

skill2.kitLine: Stage 3: Activates when Explore Route Stage 2 is at max stacks. Affects self.
skill2.where: not encoded as a gate (documented in note + caveat ⚑4, NOT in unmodeled array)
skill2.note: Same as stage-2 gate: ordering not encoded, parallel build over-credits. Documented, not silent.

skill2.kitLine: Stage 3: Hit Rate ▲ 4.08%. Stacks up to 5 times and lasts for 0.5 sec.
skill2.note: hitRatePct inert v1 (⚑5). 0.5s lapses each reload, rebuilds on resume.

skill2.kitLine: Stage 3: ATK ▲ 7.36%. Stacks up to 5 times and lasts for 0.5 sec.
skill2.note: Peak while firing (all stages): ATK +110.3%, Hit Rate +61.1% (HR inert).

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Attack Damage ▲ 57.08% for 10 sec.
Affects self. Reload Speed ▲ 25.87% for 10 sec.
burst.note: Reload speed modeled as shot count.

burst.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Deals 1736.31% of final ATK as Distributed Damage.
burst.where: burst[1] (burstCast enemy flatDamage atkPct 1736.31 flavor distributed)
burst.note: burstCast → auto-FB-exempt. ⚑6: S1a's +49.58 distributed bucket is assumed to apply to this nuke at cast — UNMEASURED, verify vs popup.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: the three Explore-Route-max gates are firing-tracking proxies (passive / hitCount-threshold), not a real stack-count gate — rebuild timing after reloads is approximate (⚑3).
documentedConfounds.why: hit-counter carries over reloads so rebuild is slightly optimistic → mild over-credit on S1b core-dmg and S1c crit uptime.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: stage-2/stage-3 stacks build in parallel with stage-1 (stage-unlock ordering not encoded) — slight over-credit during ramp/post-reload (⚑4).
documentedConfounds.why: Explicitly named in the note as her flag-off HOT baseline driver: parallel build over-credits stage-2/3 by ~0.4–0.8s per ramp/post-reload rebuild → ratio > 1.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Hit Rate stacks modeled as hitRatePct (inert in v1) — magnitude of the core-rate lift unmeasured (⚑5).
documentedConfounds.why: hitRatePct does nothing in v1; if the real kit grants a core-hit-rate lift, the model UNDER-counts it. Inert today, so a missing real lift would pull ratio down.

documentedConfounds.text: all: cadence = datamined 24 pulls/s (rate_of_fire 1440/60); muzzle_count 2 splits shot damage (nAM 10.12 = 5.06×2 already baked) — throughput self-consistent, NOT over-modeled (owner-confirmed 2026-07-19). reloadFrames 81 still raw datamine (⚑1).
documentedConfounds.why: Owner-confirmed cadence is self-consistent and not the HOT source; reloadFrames 81 raw is a small unmeasured residual, direction unknown.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑2 'after 2 normal attacks' hits-vs-pulls ambiguity (count 2 hits = per pull; if 2 SHOTS use count 4).
documentedConfounds.why: Steady-state insensitive, ramp-only — negligible at 24 pulls/s.

documentedConfounds.text: ⚑6 burst distributed nuke: S1a's +49.58 distributed bucket assumed to apply at cast — verify vs popup.
documentedConfounds.why: If the +49.58 distributed bucket does NOT actually apply to the burst nuke, the model over-credits the nuke → would reduce the HOT ratio; unmeasured.

authorIntentSummary: This is an explicit PARSER-BASELINE HYPOTHESIS, not a validated model (banner + every ⚑ flagged unmeasured; hand-tune required before trusting numbers). Skill2 'Explore Route' is built as a single hitCount-2 self block carrying all six stacks (3 stages × ATK+HitRate); the 'each subsequent effect triggers all before it' cascade is encoded by co-location, but the stage-unlock ORDERING is deliberately NOT encoded, so stages build in parallel — the documented HOT driver (⚑4 over-credit). Skill1's three Explore-Route-max gates are approximated as firing-tracking proxies (one passive, two hitCount-threshold buffs) rather than real stack-count gates. Burst is a clean self attackDamage/reloadSpeed buff plus a 1736.31% distributed nuke, with an unmeasured assumption (⚑6) that S1a's distributed bucket applies to the nuke at cast. Known-not-faithful spots: stage parallel-build over-credit, inert hitRatePct core-rate lift (⚑5), proxy gate rebuild timing, and raw reloadFrames 81.
